pi_items.source: setup_jitsi.sh (line 45) creates .env at this path; setup_task.sh (line 21) references this location

Official Jitsi docker-jitsi-meet env.example file (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jitsi/docker-jitsi-meet/master/env.example) and Jitsi handbook documentation (https://jitsi.github.io/handbook/docs/dev-guide/dev-guide-configuration/) do not document WHITEBOARD_ENABLED as a standard environment variable. Only WHITEBOARD_COLLAB_SERVER_URL_BASE and WHITEBOARD_COLLAB_SERVER_PUBLIC_URL are documented.

Official Jitsi docker-jitsi-meet env.example file confirms WHITEBOARD_COLLAB_SERVER_PUBLIC_URL is the standard environment variable for setting the excalidraw-backend public URL (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jitsi/docker-jitsi-meet/master/env.example)
Jitsi URL format is http(s)://host:port/{room-name} as documented in multiple sources. Docker compose (line 7) maps port 8080 to 80. Room name 'WhiteboardGlossarySession' matches task description.

privileged_info_summary: The task enables Jitsi Meet's Excalidraw-based collaborative whiteboard feature (v stable-9753) by modifying /home/ga/jitsi/.env with WHITEBOARD_COLLAB_SERVER_PUBLIC_URL (a standard Docker environment variable documented in official Jitsi sources). The meeting URL http://localhost:8080/WhiteboardGlossarySession follows the correct Jitsi URL format with port 8080 mapped to the web container. However, WHITEBOARD_ENABLED is not a documented standard environment variable in official Jitsi Docker documentation.
